# Error cases: missing args, unknown targets, bad flags.

# Commands requiring a star chart fail gracefully if entity not found
exec orbiter galaxy add test-corp

! exec orbiter survey nonexistent
stderr 'not found|no target'

! exec orbiter scan nonexistent
stderr 'not found|no target'

! exec orbiter jump nonexistent --yes
stderr 'not found|no target'

# Missing required flags
! exec orbiter planet add orphan-planet
stderr 'required flag.*galaxy|galaxy.*required'

! exec orbiter resource add myres --role tool
stderr 'required flag.*brand|brand.*required'

! exec orbiter resource add myres --brand git
stderr 'required flag.*role|role.*required'

# attach requires exactly 2 args
! exec orbiter attach only-one
stderr 'accepts 2 arg'
